'''''Archon''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. The [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] responded to the prison station [[Bundil II]], which requested aid when the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser]] [[VTR-LX]] was disabled and its prisoners were rescued as part of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operation. By the time ''Archon'' arrived, the Rebels and prisoners had managed to escape the station, leaving a bomb that destroyed the Dreadnaught.<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance" />
